_comment: Engine-pack catalog for Kingside, served via GitHub Pages and fetched by EngineRegistry.fetch_catalog(). Each pack is DATA ONLY — a neural-net (.nnue) evaluation file plus optional UCI option overrides — that runs on the Stockfish binary already compiled into the app. No executable code is ever downloaded, which is what keeps in-app engine installs compliant with App Store Guideline 2.5.2. To add a pack: drop a compatible .nnue into engines/nets/, then add an entry below with its size_bytes + sha256 (the app validates both before installing). See engines/README.md.

packs.name: Stockfish 18 — Official Network
packs.author: The Stockfish team · GPLv3
packs.description: Installs the official Stockfish 18 evaluation network as a downloadable data pack, run by the built-in engine. Works fully offline once installed.
